title: Bildwerk Router - Active img2img Workflow (NO ControlNet)
description: CURRENT ACTIVE WORKFLOW: Basic 8-node img2img workflow built by router/__init__.py _build_comfyui_workflow(). This is the EXACT workflow currently submitted to ComfyUI /prompt endpoint. ControlNet is NOT included despite what the preset says - the router code does not implement ControlNet yet.
format: ComfyUI API prompt JSON (not UI workflow JSON)

inputs.text: photorealistic modern building facade, high quality, detailed architecture, natural lighting, 8k
drawing, painting, sketch, illustration, low quality, blurry, distorted, text, watermark

notes: This is the BASIC img2img workflow used by the router in production
ControlNet is NOT included - the router code has not been updated to use it
The interior_passage_v2_p1 preset mentions ControlNet but it is not implemented in the router
Dynamic values: seed, denoise, cfg, sampler, scheduler come from preset config
